title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: Jeff Su walks through NotebookLM's updated interface and feature set, including a three-column layout with Sources, Chat, and Studio panels. The Studio panel offers tools for generating reports, slide decks, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio summaries from uploaded sources. Su ranks the tools into must-use and situational tiers and shares prompt templates for converting raw sources into finished outputs.
